Developer behind controversial AI apps sues Apple over App Store takedowns

Marcus Mendes

Ex-Human, the developer behind Botify and Photify AI, is suing Apple over what it calls arbitrary App Store removals.

Developer seeks injunction against bans

The company says Apple cut off access to its developer account after the apps were removed from the App Store.

Apple’s actions caused irreparable harm to the business.

FTC: We use income earning auto affiliate links.
